name: Rocket Propulsion
description: This course provides an in-depth study of the fundamentals of rocket propulsion, covering topics such as thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, and combustion processes.

name: Aerodynamics
description: This course offers a comprehensive exploration of aerodynamics, focusing on the principles and applications of airflow and its effects on flying objects.

name: Spacecraft Design
description: This course delves into the principles and methodologies of spacecraft design, offering students a comprehensive understanding of the engineering and science behind building and maintaining spacecraft.

name: Organic Chemistry
description: Organic Chemistry is an in-depth study of the structure, properties, composition, reactions, and synthesis of carbon-containing compounds.

name: Inorganic Chemistry
description: Inorganic Chemistry focuses on the properties, structures, and behaviors of inorganic and organometallic compounds.

name: Physical Chemistry
description: Physical Chemistry merges the principles of physics and chemistry to understand the physical properties of molecules.

name: Ancient Languages
description: This course offers an exploration of ancient languages, delving into their origins, development, and cultural significance.
